Part.Source:
Event Start
btnReimprimir.Visible = 0 tbAguarde.Visible = 0 retornaAutorizacao.Call('WWREMESSA', Status_SimNao.Sim, 2, &AutNiv) loadWWPContext.Call(&Context) &EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod &FilCod = &Context.FilCod &AcePesCod = &context.PesCod
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
UnnamedTable2.Height = 5
Do 'AttributesSecurityCode' Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Grid.Rows = 30 &GridCurrentPage = 1 &GridCurrentPage.Visible = False &GridPageCount = -1 GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
If &HTTPRequest.Method = 'GET' &Operacao = 1 Do 'AttributesSecurityCode' EndIf &DtaIni.SetEmpty() &DtaFim = &Today &SemRet = Status_SimNao.Sim
EndEvent
Event Refresh
&GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridRecordCount = Grid.RecordCount &GridPageCount = grid.PageCount Do 'AttributesSecurityCode'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
//The variable '&GridPageCount' must be assigned manually in order to get a correct behaviour of the Pagination Bar.
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event Grid.Load
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
//this code should be inside the For Each used to load the grid
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
CreDupNro.Link = VerDuplicata.Link('wwGeraCobranca', EmpCod, FilCod, CreCod)
EndEvent
Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' &GridCurrentPage -= 1 Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' &GridCurrentPage += 1 Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) &GridCurrentPage = &PageToGo Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase Refresh
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue &GridCurrentPage = 1 Grid.FirstPage()
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoSaldo'
wwsaldo.Link()
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoVerificarRetornoADM'
Do Case Case &CbrCtaBanBanCod = '748' prcRetornoRecebimentoADMERP.Call(&EmpCod, &CbrCtaBanCod, &CbrNroCon)
Case &CbrCtaBanBanCod = '077' prcRetornoRecebimentoADMERP.Call(&EmpCod, &CbrCtaBanCod, &AuxCbrNroCon)
EndCase
Do Case Case &Operacao = 3 and &IsAPIOnline = True &SdtBaixadeRemessa.FromJson(&WEBSESSION.Get('Retorno_cobranca'))
If &SdtBaixadeRemessa.Count > 0 btnReimprimir.Visible = 1 RCOOpenWindow1.LinkOpen = RELJAS038.Link(&EmpCod, &FilCod) RCOOpenWindow1.OpenWindow(True, 500, 500, True, 0, 0, False) Else msg(DVMessageGetBasicNotificationMsg.Udp(!"Atenção", "Nenhum Retorno Encontrado.", DVMessageType.regular, "", DVMessageBoolean.True, "")) Endif EndCase
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoBuscaRetornoOnline'
If &Operacao = 2 and &IsAPIOnline = True and &CbrTipBol = TipoBoleto.Tradicional and &CbrCtaBanBanCod = '748'
&WEBSESSION.Set('Retorno_cobranca', '') RetornoBoletoApiECommerce.call(&ProgressId,&EmpCod,&FilCod,&CreCod,&CbrCod,'D','', &Context.UserName) &SdtBaixadeRemessa.FromJson(&WEBSESSION.Get('Retorno_cobranca')) If &SdtBaixadeRemessa.Count > 0 btnReimprimir.Visible = 1 RCOOpenWindow1.LinkOpen = RELJAS038.Link(&EmpCod,&FilCod) RCOOpenWindow1.OpenWindow(True, 500, 500, True, 0, 0, False) Else msg('Nenhum Retorno Encontrado') EndIf else Msg('Retorno on-line não atende os requisitos entre em contato com suporte!') EndIf
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Event 'DoReimprimir'
If &SdtBaixadeRemessa.Count > 0 RCOOpenWindow1.LinkOpen = RELJAS038.Link(&EmpCod,&FilCod) RCOOpenWindow1.OpenWindow(True, 500, 500, True, 0, 0, False) Else msg('Retorno não Disponivel!') Endif
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndEvent
Sub 'AttributesSecurityCode'
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
If not(&Operacao = 2) DVPanel_Importar_Cell.Class = !'Invisible' Else DVPanel_Importar_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 CellMarginTop' EndIf If not(&Operacao = 3) DVPanel_UnnamedTable1_Cell.Class = !'Invisible' Else DVPanel_UnnamedTable1_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12 CellMarginTop' EndIf tbaco.Visible = (&Operacao = 1) If not(&Operacao = 1) DVPanel_Duplicatas_Cell.Class = !'Invisible' Else DVPanel_Duplicatas_Cell.Class = !'col-xs-12' EndIf DadosEmissao.Visible = (&Operacao = 1)
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
EndSub
Event &Operacao.IsValid
Do 'AttributesSecurityCode' Do 'ValidaLocalCobranca'
EndEvent
Event Enter
Do Case Case &Operacao = 1 and &IsAPIOnline = True //and &CbrCtaBanBanCod = '748' // 1 = Gera autorização na api Sicredi btnEnter.Visible = 0 tbAguarde.Visible = 1 &ProgressId = 'DUP_ONLINE_'+trim(str(&Context.EmpCod)) + trim(Str(&Context.PesCod)) scaProgressBar1.ProcessId = &ProgressId scaProgressBar1.UpdateProgressURL = retornaProgresso.Link(&ProgressId) scaProgressBar1.Start() &AuxCbrCod = &CbrCod GeraCobranca_OnLine.Submit(&ProgressId, &ProgressId, &Context.EmpCod, &FilCod ,&CbrCod, &DtaIni, &DtaFim,&SemRet, &CreSts, &CreDtaVct)
Case &Operacao = 1 and &IsAPIOnline = False// 1 = Gerar arquivo remessa GeraCobranca.Call(&Context.EmpCod,&FilCod ,&CbrCod, &DtaIni, &DtaFim,&SemRet,&CbrUltRem, &CreSts, &CreDtaVct, &link) WPRemessaGerada.Call(&Context.EmpCod,&CbrCod,&CbrUltRem,&link)
EndCase
EndEvent
Event scaProgressBar1.OnComplete
Do Case Case &Operacao = 1 btnEnter.Visible = 1 RCOOpenWindow1.LinkOpen = RELJAS023A.link(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &AuxCbrCod, 0) RCOOpenWindow1.OpenWindow(True, 500, 500, True, 0, 0, False)
grid.Refresh()
Case &Operacao = 1 and &IsAPIOnline = True &SdtBaixadeRemessa.FromJson(&WEBSESSION.Get('Retorno_cobranca'))
If &SdtBaixadeRemessa.Count > 0 btnReimprimir.Visible = 1 RCOOpenWindow1.LinkOpen = RELJAS038.Link(&EmpCod,&FilCod) RCOOpenWindow1.OpenWindow(True, 500, 500, True, 0, 0, False) Endif EndCase
EndEvent
Event FileUpload1.UploadComplete
&ppJASPI_DuplicatasPagasdtDuplicatas.Duplicatas.Items.Clear() For &FileUploadData in &FileUploadDataColl If not &FileUploadData.File.IsEmpty() &File.Source=&FileUploadData.File &selectedURL = &File.GetAbsoluteName() /// Pega o local temporario &File.Close()
If &selectedURL <> '' &WEBSESSION.Set('Retorno_cobranca', '') RetornoGeraCobranca.Call(&EmpCod, &Context.PesCod, &selectedURL, &Context.UserName) &SdtBaixadeRemessa.FromJson(&WEBSESSION.Get('Retorno_cobranca'))
If &SdtBaixadeRemessa.Count > 0 btnReimprimir.Visible = 1 RCOOpenWindow1.LinkOpen = RELJAS038.Link(&EmpCod,&FilCod) RCOOpenWindow1.OpenWindow(True, 500, 500, True, 0, 0, False)
// &window.Url = RELJAS038.Link(&EmpCod,&FilCod) // &window.Height = 800 // &window.Width = 800 // &window.Open()
EndIf Else msg('Arquivo Inválido!') EndIf EndIf EndFor
FileUpload1.Clear() &FileUploadDataColl.clear()
EndEvent
Event &CbrCod.Click
do 'ValidaLocalCobranca'
EndEvent
Event &CbrCod.IsValid
do 'ValidaLocalCobranca'
EndEvent
Sub 'ValidaLocalCobranca'
&IsAPIOnline = False For each Order EmpCod,CbrCod,CrbRegAut //,CbrChaMas Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where CbrCod = &CbrCod //Where not CbrChaMas.Trim().IsEmpty() or CbrCtaBanBanCod = '237' Or CbrCtaBanBanCod = '077' // ou se for bradesco, ou inter Where CrbRegAut = Status_simNao.Sim Where CbrCtaBanBanCod = '748' or CbrCtaBanBanCod = '237' or CbrCtaBanBanCod = '999' Or CbrCtaBanBanCod = '077'//sicredi ou bradesco ou Jaspi Pagamentos ou INTER &CbrCtaBanCod = CbrCtaBanCod &CbrCtaBanBanCod = CbrCtaBanBanCod &IsAPIOnline = True &CbrTipBol = CbrTipBol &CbrCtaBanBanCod = CbrCtaBanBanCod &CbrCtaBanAgeCod = CbrCtaBanAgeCod &CbrCtaBanAgeDig = CbrCtaBanAgeDig &CbrNroCon = CbrNroCon
&AuxCbrNroCon = CbrNroCon.Trim() + CbrNroConDig.Trim() //INTER
exit EndFor
Do CASE Case &Operacao = 2 and &IsAPIOnline = True and &CbrTipBol = TipoBoleto.Tradicional and &CbrCtaBanBanCod = '748' //Sicredi API Ecomm &DtaRetFim = &Today &DtaRetIni = &Today-60 tbimpo.Visible = true BTNBuscaRetornoOnline.Visible = True Case &Operacao = 2 tbimpo.Visible = True BTNBuscaRetornoOnline.Visible = False
OtherWise btnEnter.Visible = 1 tbAguarde.Visible = 0 EndCase
EndSub

Property.Name: Description
Property.Value: Cre Cbr Cta Ban Ban Cod
